message.content:
@startuml
actor PowerUser as user

participant ":EnergyConsumptionInPeriodUI" as UI
participant ":EnergyConsumptionInPeriodCTRL" as CTRL
participant ":RoomList" as RoomLst
participant ":Room" as Rm
participant ":Device" as Dev
participant ":ReadConfigFile" as ReadCfgFle
participant ":ReadingList" as ReadingLst
participant ":Reading" as Rdg


activate user 
note right of user : 1 Get Total Metered\n Energy Consumption 

user ->> UI:  
deactivate user 


activate UI   
note left of UI :2 Show Options: Device,Room,Grid  

UI -->> user:    
deactivate UI  


activate user     
note right of user :3 Choose Room option   

user->> UI:      
deactivate user   



activate UI       
note left of UI :4 rLS=showRoomLIstlnStr()    

UI--> CTRL:        
deactivate UI     




activate CTRL         
note left of CTRL :5 rLS = showRooomListinStr()     

CTRL --> RoomLst:          
deactivate CTRL       





activate RoomLst           
note left of RoomLst :6 Show Room List      

RoomLst-- >> user:            
deactivate RoomLst        






activate user              
note right of user :7 Choose a Room       

user ->> UI:               
deactivate user         







activate UI                
note left of UI :8 Ask for the time interval        

UI -->> user:                 
deactivate UI           








activate user                  
note right of user :9 Input the time interval          

user ->> UI:                   
deactivate user            









activate UI                    
note left of UI :10 tMe=getEnergyConsumption \n InPerioid(index,start,end)             

UI --> CTRL:                     
deactivate UI               










activate CTRL                      
note left of CTRL :11tME=getEnerygyConsuimtion \n inperiod(inexx , start end )                  

CTRL ---> Rm:                       
deactivate CTRL                 











activate Rm                        
note left of Rm :12 Tme getenergyconsumptio n\ nin period(startend                        

Rm ---->Dev:                         
deactivate Rm                    













 activate dev                          
 note left ofdev   :13 i-getDevicesMetering Period ()                           
 
 DEV---- >readcfgfle:                              
 deactivateDEV                                 
 
 
  
 Activate readcfgefile                               
 Noteleftofreacfgfeile :14TnegetvalueOfRea dingsintimeinterval(star tend                                   
  
 READCFGFILE------>.READINGLIST:                                        DEACTIVATE REACFGFEILE                                         
   
 ACTIVATE .readinglist                                           NOTELEFTOF.READING LIST:v-return value OF reading                                           
    
.reading list-------->:rdG                                                 deactivatereadinglisr                                              
     
 activaterdg                                                  notel eftofdrg                                                    rd g-----..powerus er                                                      Deactiverd G                                                       END
